name: SwimWays Spring Float Premium Recliner Pool Lounger, Inflatable Pool Floats for Adults with Fast Inflation, for Ages 15 & Up
bullets: Inflatable Recliner Adult Float: This colorful, roomy inflatable pool float features a patented inner spring for stability, a built-in headrest, back rest, foot rest, and cupholder for comfortable and convenient lounging

Inflate and Deflate 3 Times Faster: Our innovative Hyper-Flate Valve takes the stress of setting up and putting away your floatie faster than ever - no pump needed, so there's more time to relax and have fun

Designed for Comfort: Each float is made with fabric-covered inflation and a soft cooling mesh bed that cradles your body just below the surface of the water, with a foldable build that allows for easy storage
Sized for Teens and Adults: When fully inflated, the Spring Float Recliner supports most adults up to 250 lbs.; Recommended for ages 15 and up; Dimensions: 55 x 38 x 15.5 inches

Discover SwimWays: Explore the collection and discover innovative ways to get your family in and loving the water, with everything from confidence-building baby products and goggles, pool toys, swim vests and floats to diving toys and outdoor games
description: Float through summer in style and comfort with the SwimWays Spring Float Premium Recliner! This large, chair-style pool float features a soft, cooling mesh that keeps your body just below the water's surface for hours of relaxation and fun on hot summer days. Keep upright with the inflatable backrest, dip your feet in the water with the ottoman, and use the integrated cupholder to bring your favorite drink along as you relax, sip, and float. The patented inner spring along the float's outer edge provides improved comfort and stability in the water, keeping you afloat and balanced. Our innovati

reviews.name: Cece Owens
reviews.title: The BEST pool float for our Golden Retriever!
reviews.body: Believe it or not, this isn’t for a person—it’s for our Golden Retriever, Leia! We’ve tried several pool floats that were actually made for dogs, but none of them were large or stable enough for her to feel comfortable.

reviews.name: 2LabsNoWaiting
reviews.title: Best Floats on the Market
reviews.body: Why did you pick this product vs others?:

reviews.name: Caregiver
reviews.title: So fast and easy to blow up!
reviews.body: I blew air into the entire float within less than two minutes, and my 90-year old, visually impaired father was safely floating in it moments later.  The headrest prevented him from his head hitting the side of the pool, and the open hole allowed him to dangle his feet in the water and to kick.  This is the first float that I have purchased that allows my father to safely be in the pool.  Of course, I watch him, but now, he can float, and I can swim.  I recommend this float.  It’s covered in a fabric, and the seat is a strong netting fabric that holds my father in place, and water keeps him co

reviews.name: KG
reviews.title: Well made and comfortable
reviews.body: I love this raft for the comfort durability and the fact that it keeps my body out of the chlorine pool water. I like to float around but I don't like my legs dangling in the water where it's going to affect my skin creating dryness. This works perfectly for that reason
